summary: The task maps directly to docs/product-specs/rest-mock-api.md and the implementation satisfies the scoped REST call route, REST response/error mapping, no-auth and Basic console execution evidence, and tagged unit/E2E coverage. The provided deterministic gates all passed, including full npm run verify.
satisfied_exit_criteria: Configured endpoints can be called via POST /rest/tools/:name/call using the shared endpoint matcher.
Scoped REST success and error responses match the updated rest-mock-api.md contract for success, invalid JSON, unauthorized, unknown/disabled tools, invalid arguments, and forced case errors.
Endpoint console executes REST calls for no-auth and Basic modes and displays raw request, raw response, matched case, auth principal, and elapsed time.
Required commands passed: npm run test:unit, npm run test:e2e -- --grep @rest-tools-call, and npm run verify.
